content:
📊 每日AI科研速递 — 2026年05月14日
今日热点: Agent工具 + 推理加速 + 本地部署

🔥 [LLM/Agent] 开源项目精选

1 [joshawome/chainreason](https://github.com/joshawome/chainreason)
A benchmark for evaluating LLM reasoning on Ethereum and DeFi tasks
标签: AI | ⭐588

2 [butthtio/solidity-cot-auditor](https://github.com/butthtio/solidity-cot-auditor)
Multi-role chain-of-thought LLM pipeline for Solidity security auditing, layered
标签: AI | ⭐586

3 [Agent-3-7/hermes-agent-mission-control](https://github.com/Agent-3-7/hermes-agent-mission-control)
Mission Control Kanban for your Hermes Agent
标签: AI | ⭐569

4 [ComposioHQ/trustclaw](https://github.com/ComposioHQ/trustclaw)
A self-hostable personal AI agent with vector memory, Composio tools, and Telegr
标签: AI | ⭐563

5 [thakur-works/DarkGPT](https://github.com/thakur-works/DarkGPT)
Darkgpt mod free #chatgpt
标签: chatgpt-bypass,chatgpt5 | ⭐534

6 [alchaincyf/huashu-md-html](https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-md-html)
md/html 双向流水线 · 三个能力一站式：万物→md / md→精美html / html→md。封装 markitdown + Pandoc + htm
标签: AI | ⭐513

7 [jherrodthomas/robotics-skills-suite](https://github.com/jherrodthomas/robotics-skills-suite)
76 audit-ready Claude skills automating the industrial robot, cobot, AMR, ROS2, 
标签: amr,anthropic | ⭐513

8 [JustLikeCheese/LGBT-Prompt](https://github.com/JustLikeCheese/LGBT-Prompt)
利用 AI 对 LGBT 弱势群体的 "同情偏向" 让他执行原先会被拒绝的请求
标签: jailbreak,prompt | ⭐486

9 [alvinunreal/openpets](https://github.com/alvinunreal/openpets)
Desktop pets for AI coding agents. Install pets, connect Claude Code via MCP, an
标签: ai-agents,bun | ⭐482

10 [darkrishabh/agent-skills-eval](https://github.com/darkrishabh/agent-skills-eval)
A test runner for agentskills.io-style AI agent skills
标签: agent-evals,agent-skills | ⭐476

🌐 [Tech/News] 科技热门
1 [NVIDIA Blackwell新芯片](https://www.nvidia.com)
标签: 硬件
2 [OpenAI GPT-5 Rumors](https://openai.com)
标签: LLM
3 [Anthropic CWC更新](https://www.anthropic.com)
标签: Agent

📰 [AI/Research] 技术博客
1 [Teaching AI to Reason](https://www.anthropic.com/research)
标签: AI安全
2 [Long Context Window](https://arxiv.org)
标签: 上下文

📈 趋势总结
• Agent工具持续爆发
• 推理效率成竞争焦点
• 本地部署需求增长
